scores.notes: Directly answers which RPO handles Texas GI Bill claims with the specific office and address.
Directly answers the dollar threshold ($45,000) that triggers four-signature review.
Directly answers MHA rate for distance-only learners (50% of national average BAH) with effective date.
Directly answers with the rate-of-pursuit calculation (0.75) and resulting 80% BAH rate for the 9/12 scenario.
Answers the benefit level (80%) for 800 days but adds nuance about 70/80 rule that slightly extends beyond the direct question. Still highly relevant.
Directly answers what happened to the 40% level: eliminated August 1, 2020 and became 50%.
Directly answers the delimiting date question for a veteran discharged in 2014 (no time limit) with correct statutory citation.
Directly answers whether Title 32 AGR service qualifies (yes), effective date, qualifying types, and retroactivity.
Directly answers whether bartending courses are allowed (no, always prohibited under all chapters).
Directly answers both parts: prohibited at flight schools, but allowed at IHLs for credit toward a degree.
Directly answers the required medical certificate type (second-class) and its validity period (12 months).
Directly answers whether Chapter 35 beneficiaries can receive VA benefits for vocational flight training (no).
Directly answers the minimum credits for 3/4-time when 12 credits is full time (9 credits).
Directly answers the training time classification (3/4 time) for the 10/13-credit scenario.
Directly answers the BDN training time code for Chapter 1606 full-time enrollment (Code 4).
Directly answers when interval payments ended (August 1, 2011) with the statutory reference.
Directly answers when a summer-term interval is payable beyond 30 days (when at least 8 weeks long).
Directly answers the folder type for Chapter 35 DEA claims (blue, two-part DEA folder).
Directly answers the suspense date for EPC 270 (60 days) and notes the contrast with the standard 30-day period.
Directly answers how many years of service are excluded for ROTC-commissioned officers (4 years).
Directly answers the excluded period for a Service Academy graduate (5 years from commissioning date).
Directly answers the maximum percentage covered by accelerated payment (60% of tuition and fees for one term).
Directly answers OJT housing allowance reduction schedule after first year with all subsequent percentage drops.
Directly answers the EPC for original Chapter 35 claims (EPC 240).
Directly answers the EPC for Chapter 1606 supplemental actions (EPC 280).
Directly answers which scorecard questions cover payment accuracy (Questions 8 through 10).
Comprehensively answers all 7 categories with question ranges and topics. Fully addresses the complex multi-part query.
Directly answers all five VADIR web service operations by name.
Directly answers the maximum response time requirement (2 seconds).
Directly answers the confidentiality, integrity, and availability classifications with standards cited.
Directly answers that SSN is required for findPeopleByCriteria and describes the field format.
Directly answers the default maximum (50) and hard cutoff (200) for findPeopleByCriteria results.
Directly answers what Character of Service code 'J' means with the full description.
Directly answers what project code '9GY' represents (Hurricane Katrina) with Training Indicator noted.
Directly answers the VADIR service code for Space Force (code 'S').
Directly and comprehensively answers all data elements returned by getServicePeriods.
Directly answers the production endpoint URL.
Directly answers what MGSR status code 'CA' means.
Directly answers what exclusionPerdTyp contains ('ROTC' or 'APPELLATE').
Directly answers the error code for 'Invalid Search Criteria' (Error 16820001) with the callStatusNote text.

Multi-section query asking about VCE process for Chapter 33 eligibility with ROTC. Answer fully addresses all parts: exclusion of ROTC period, VADIR data lookup, benefit level calculation, and delimiting date rules.
Directly answers the Chapter 32 delimiting date (10 years from discharge date).
Directly answers whether surviving spouses have a delimiting date (no per CAVC) while correctly noting the distinction from regular Chapter 35 spouses.
Directly answers what the VCE must check regarding MGIB when Chapter 33 entitlement exhausts (eligibility for $1,200 MGIB refund/96R).
Directly answers which RPO has jurisdiction for guest/transient students (the degree-conferring school's RPO).
Directly answers the transaction code for work study allowance in Benefits Manager (06L).
Directly answers when Chapter 33 payment review transitioned from BDN to eMPWR (July 8, 2024).
Directly answers DGI record lock release time for inactive users (15 minutes).
Directly answers both parts: the law (PL 116-315, Section 1010) and effective dates for both NCD and IHL beneficiaries.
Multi-section synthesis query about VADIR operations sequence. Answer covers all five operations, order, purpose, and how data is used for eligibility calculation.
Cross-source query about Character of Service code 'H'. Answer explains what the code means, connects it to M22-4 eligibility requirements, and gives the eligibility determination. Fully responsive.
Cross-source query about project code '9GF' and qualifying service. Answer explains OCO code, Training Indicator, and directly applies M22-4 qualifying service rules.
Cross-source query about VADIR trainingPeriod and M22-4 deduction rules. Answer explains the VADIR element, the M22-4 730-day threshold, and the VCE cross-reference process.

Query asks specifically what eligibility decision the MGIB code and separation code inform. Answer is relevant but spends significant text on MGIB participation context and Ch. 33 election procedures, slightly beyond the core question of what the codes inform. Still substantially responsive.
Directly answers that Purple Heart recipient gets 100% regardless of service length, with VADIR data element reference.
Directly answers which VADIR data element corresponds to delimiting date (eduPgmEntlDelimitDt in bdnEnt), where each system stores it, and how to reconcile against PL 115-48.
Directly answers how ch1606Ent data relates to Chapter 1606 eligibility including all data elements and MGSR status code meanings.

Query asks what kickerRateCode 'B1' means and how VCE applies it. Answer explains the code (well), notes it's OBSOLETE, and gives application context. The OBSOLETE status is potentially important but not the direct answer — slightly tangential but useful operational context.
Directly answers whether the veteran (not on active duty) qualifies for MHA (yes, if enrolled above half-time).
Directly answers both elements: svcCd 'F' = Air Force, statute 'A' = 10 USC 688 for recalled retirees.
Directly answers how QA evaluates VADIR-based eligibility determinations (Question 6) with explanation of what reviewers check.
Directly addresses both parts: explains no EPC exists for Chapter 33 (clarifying EPCs for other chapters) and identifies the VADIR operation (getServicePeriods) used in LTS processing.

Query asks about remaining entitlement and benefit type from eduPgmEntlMtsQy and eduPgmTypCd. Answer correctly calculates 24 months remaining and notes the VCE verification step. The eduPgmTypCd '2' interpretation is somewhat vague ('maps to program type code') without resolving what program type '2' actually is — minor gap.
Directly answers how the 5-year Service Academy obligation is handled in Chapter 33 calculation using VADIR militaryAcademyPeriod data with a concrete example.
Directly answers which VADIR data elements determine 100% benefit via SC disability discharge, with the 30-day minimum rule from M22-4.
Directly answers how cipInd relates to Chapter 33 calculation (CIP periods not qualifying, must subtract from active service).
Directly answers implications of Chapter 30 to Chapter 33 election: irrevocable election, $1,200 refund eligibility, and the VADIR fields that confirm participation.
Directly answers the DGI fallback workflow when VADIR returns no results, including the create-new-record path and callStatus interpretation.
Directly answers which office handles foreign school claims (Buffalo RPO), how to confirm eligibility via VADIR, and the MHA rate for foreign schools.
Directly answers what causes different results on two pulls (resultsHash change indicates DoD update) and what the system should do (re-evaluate eligibility).
Directly answers how QA verifies correct training time codes for nonstandard terms, including the conversion formula and reference tables.
Directly answers both parts: VADIR education level code for baccalaureate (code '51') and its relationship to Chapter 1606 MGSR suspended status.
Directly answers both parts: Chapter 1606 big-pay thresholds and which VADIR fields confirm Chapter 1606 participation.
Directly answers how PGIB separation code relates to the 30-day exception, explaining the qualifying discharge reasons.
Directly answers what additional verification is needed for Title 32 AGR service in eMPWR, including VADIR statute/project codes to check and the eMPWR system context.
Consulting SME query about human judgment gaps. Answer identifies four specific areas where automation falls short with policy citations. Fully responsive and appropriately detailed.
Consulting SME query about how stale service record updates would be detected. Answer covers all layers: resultsHash, M22-4 VCE obligations, M22-3 QA sampling gap, and the most likely detection path.
Consulting SME query about single points of failure. Answer identifies three critical dependencies with specific technical detail from the ICD and M22-4. Fully responsive to the question.
Consulting SME query about data quality risks between service codes and policy. Answer identifies three specific risk scenarios with VADIR code table references. Fully responsive.

Consulting SME query about whether QA distinguishes data errors vs. VCE errors. Answer explains all 7 QA categories, their scope, and explicitly addresses the gap where correctly-applied-but-wrong-data claims pass QA. Fully responsive.

Consulting SME query about downstream impacts of slow service record lookups. Answer covers VADIR SLA, LTS stalling, DGI lock issues, and eMPWR impacts. Fully responsive with correct scoping of blast radius.

Consulting SME query about data reconciliation challenges for Chapter 1606 to Chapter 33 transitions. Answer identifies three specific reconciliation challenges with VADIR data elements. Fully responsive.

Consulting SME query about long-term maintainability implications of dynamic DMDC codes. Answer identifies three risks and explicitly calls out the structural maintenance debt across four systems. Fully responsive.
Consulting SME query about how wrong benefit levels from incomplete data would be caught. Answer analyzes all four detection layers and their gaps. Fully responsive.
Consulting SME query about re-architecture. Answer covers event-driven integration, rules engine encoding M22-4 logic, code table mapping, and automated QA. Fully and directly addresses the question.
Prod ops triage query. Answer provides a numbered step-by-step triage process covering callStatus codes, SLA verification, DGI record locks, operation scoping, and VCE guidance. Fully responsive.
Prod ops query about same benefit level across all Tuesday claims. Answer provides probable causes in probability order, triage approach, and remediation steps. Fully responsive.

Prod ops query about bio info without service history. Answer explains the two-step VADIR call architecture, possible causes, VCE fallback procedure, and how to interpret callStatus. Fully responsive.
Prod ops query about transformation errors. Answer identifies Error 16820004, explains what it means, provides diagnostic approach, and gives the immediate playbook. Fully responsive.
Prod ops query about post-eMPWR migration payment history gaps. Answer explains what's expected per M22-4, explains when gaps are normal vs. not, and provides escalation criteria. Fully responsive.
Prod ops query about payload size doubling. Answer explains possible causes, performance risks relative to SLA, and monitoring recommendations. Fully responsive.

Prod ops query about batch authorization errors from same school. Answer follows the M22-4 escalation steps and identifies school-specific likely causes, escalation path, and RPO jurisdiction consideration. Fully responsive.

Prod ops query about VADIR DR failover. Answer identifies VADIR environments, Section 7.4 reference, pre/post verification steps including TLS, callStatus monitoring, and resultsHash checks. Fully responsive.
Prod ops query about diagnosing QA error rate spikes. Answer provides a three-way diagnostic framework (training vs. policy vs. data) with specific pattern signatures for each. Fully responsive.

Prod ops query about eMPWR maintenance window impact. Answer covers which workflows stop, what VCEs can still do (DGI), BT ordering risk, record lock handling, and pre/post checklists. Fully responsive.
Contradiction query about 36 vs. 48 months. Answer correctly explains both are right (36 per program, 48 combined across programs) and directs VCE to check bdnEnt for cross-program entitlement.
Contradiction query about BDN vs. eMPWR. Answer correctly explains the temporal split: both are right for different time periods, and helps VCEs know which to use when.
Contradiction query about 90-day minimum and basic training deduction. Answer resolves the contradiction through the 730-day threshold rule and mentions the SC disability exception.
Temporal query about which rules apply for a 2019 stale claim reopened in 2026. Answer identifies all relevant policy changes since 2019 and correctly states today's rules apply generally.

Temporal eligibility query for 2011 separation in 2026. Answer correctly applies the 15-year delimiting date rule, notes the calculation hinges on exact separation date, and mentions extension possibilities.

Temporal query about enrollment certification rule changes. Answer correctly identifies PL 116-315 phases with dates, explains old vs. new procedures, and notes why older M22-4 sections are inconsistent.

Negative query asking for a procedure that doesn't exist as described. Answer correctly states there is no traditional correspondence-only Chapter 33 procedure, explains why, and gives the correct operational context including MHA exclusion and FOCAS note.

Negative query about a benefit level appeal process. Answer correctly states there is no subjective appeal, explains the two legitimate paths (service record review and NOD/EPC 270), and clarifies what can be challenged.

Negative query about coding bootcamps under Chapter 33. Answer correctly identifies the SAA-approval requirement, notes most bootcamps aren't approved, explains VET TEC as the appropriate alternative, and gives the VCE decision tree.
Ambiguous term query about what 'LTS' refers to. Answer correctly identifies Long Term Solution, its role in Chapter 33 processing, its relationship to VADIR, and the disambiguation note.
Ambiguous term query about 'master record'. Answer correctly identifies at least three different meanings (BDN, eMPWR, VADIR/DMDC) and the temporal split for Chapter 33.

Ambiguous term query about 'character of service' across eligibility rules and service record data. Answer clarifies the code vs. policy representation, provides the full code table, and identifies the critical blank-defaults-to-honorable risk.

Synthesis query asking for end-to-end flow from application to first MHA payment. Answer covers all numbered stages with correct system references and policy citations. Fully responsive and appropriately detailed for a synthesis query.
Synthesis query about all systems for a new RPO claims examiner. Answer covers 8 systems with descriptions of what each does and the M22-3 QA coverage reference. Fully responsive.
Synthesis query about all passive ways payment can change after initial determination. Answer identifies 7 distinct mechanisms with policy citations. Fully responsive and appropriately comprehensive.
